title: Fashion Editorial Watercolor Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Fashion Editorial Watercolor Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Fashion editorial watercolor portrait illustration of adult Black woman with deep brown skin, cropped natural curls, calm warm expression, wearing cream linen wrap blouse with loose sleeves and small gold earrings, in Fashion editorial watercolor portrait illustration of fixed PERSON detail, wearing fixed OUTFIT detail, in a subtle fixed BACKGROUND MOOD detail atmosphere. Subject: adult Black woman with deep brown skin, cropped natural curls, calm warm expression appears with respectful non-stereotyped features, natural proportions, calm warm expression, and relaxed editorial presence, framed as waist-up three-quarter angle, gentle head tilt, relaxed shoulders. Scene: Minimalist editorial background with Fashion editorial watercolor portrait illustration of fixed PERSON detail, wearing fixed OUTFIT detail, in a subtle fixed BACKGROUND MOOD detail atmosphere., generous negative space, visible white watercolor paper texture, and soft atmospheric wash rather than detailed scenery. Composition: Fixed relaxed portrait composition: waist-up three-quarter angle, gentle head tilt, relaxed shoulders, gentle head tilt or subtle three-quarter angle, open unfinished edges, deliberate blank paper space, and balanced fashion-magazine portrait framing. Signature Elements: adult Black woman with deep brown skin, cropped natural curls, calm warm expression, cream linen wrap blouse with loose sleeves and small gold earrings, Fashion editorial watercolor portrait illustration of fixed PERSON detail, wearing fixed OUTFIT detail, in a subtle fixed BACKGROUND MOOD detail atmosphere., waist-up three-quarter angle, gentle head tilt, relaxed shoulders, delicate ink linework, translucent watercolor washes, wet edges, negative space, and minimalist fashion editorial polish. Fixed source details: Background Mood: soft rainy Paris window light with pale grey-blue atmosphere. Style: Fashion editorial watercolor illustration with fine delicate ink or pencil linework, translucent layered washes, loose fluid brush strokes, wet-on-wet blending, soft bleeding edges, unfinished open edges, and elegant editorial restraint. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Waist-up or hip-to-head editorial portrait crop with natural proportions, calm posture, and readable outfit silhouette. Materials: Watercolor paper grain, translucent pigment pools, fine ink or pencil lines, bleeding wash edges, fabric folds from cream linen wrap blouse with loose sleeves and small gold earrings, and minimal paper texture. Restrictions: Works for any adult gender, ethnicity, skin tone, hairstyle, and body type;
